description: Stylised calibration targets for an artificial high-income economy. Values are literature-informed moments for simulated method of moments; they do not replicate any single country's administrative data.
sources: Dustmann, Frattini and Preston (2013): wage distribution effects
Peri (2016): immigrants, productivity, and labour markets
OECD International Migration Outlook (2024): migrant entrepreneurship

validation_holdout.note: Reserved for future validation against observed historical shocks; not used in calibration.
